arabic: الزَّكَاةُ أَحَدُ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ الْخَمْسَةِ وَتَعْنِي إِعْطَاءَ جُزْءٍ مِنَ الْمَالِ لِلْمُحْتَاجِينَ.
translation: Zekat je jedan od pet stubova islama i znači davanje dijela imovine onima kojima treba.
translationEn: Zakat is one of the five pillars of Islam and means giving a portion of wealth to those in need.
